summary: Restored two repository-control files under `extern/dolphin`: a local `.editorconfig` that makes Makefile indentation use tabs, and a local `.gitignore` that ignores generated libraries, build outputs, local tools/executables, compiler contents, and baserom/original-file directories while preserving `.gitkeep` files. No PR body or review discussion was present in the slice.
what_changed: Added `extern/dolphin/.editorconfig` with `root = true` and a `[Makefile]` section setting `indent_style = tab`.
Added `extern/dolphin/.gitignore` to ignore built static libraries via `*.a`.
Added ignore rules for build artifacts under `build/`.
Added ignore rules for local binary executables and tools: `tools/dtk`, `objdiff`, and `*.exe`.
Added ignore rules for local compiler contents under `mwcc_compiler/*`.
Added ignore rules for original/baserom files under `baserom/*`.
Added an exception rule `!**/.gitkeep` so placeholder `.gitkeep` files remain trackable inside otherwise ignored directories.
smart_moves: Kept the configuration scoped to `extern/dolphin` instead of changing global project ignore/editor behavior.
Used a nested `.editorconfig` with `root = true`, which prevents parent EditorConfig settings from accidentally overriding the external Dolphin subtree.
Explicitly preserved `.gitkeep` files despite broad ignore patterns, allowing required empty directory structure to remain represented in git.
Separated ignore rules by purpose with comments: built libraries, build artifacts, local executables, compiler files, original files, and `.gitkeep` preservation.
decomp_lessons: External SDK/vendor subtrees may need their own repository hygiene files when their build products, compiler drops, and original binaries differ from the main project.
For decompilation repositories, ignore local compiler installations and baserom/original-file directories so legally or locally supplied files are not accidentally committed.
When restoring or importing external project directories, include local formatting rules for Makefiles so tab-sensitive build files are edited safely.
Broad ignore rules should include explicit exceptions for structural placeholders such as `.gitkeep` when empty directories are expected by tooling.
naming_conventions: Ignored compiler directory is named `mwcc_compiler`, matching the Metrowerks compiler terminology used by the project.
Original input files are grouped under `baserom/`.
Local Dolphin Toolkit executable path appears as `tools/dtk`.
review_feedback: No review comments, issue comments, reviews, or PR body text were present in the provided slice.
follow_up_queries: Are other `extern/` subtrees missing local `.gitignore` or `.editorconfig` files for generated artifacts?
Do build scripts depend on `.gitkeep` placeholders inside ignored `extern/dolphin` directories?
